diff: Launch Agent 6 is an Agent focused on building credit infrastructure for onchain and traditional finance, with a focus on USD₮ liquidity. In addition to allocating capital to scale Sky’s collateral portfolio, Launch Agent 6 serves as a platform enabling stablecoin distribution hubs—including exchanges, wallets, and neobanks—to access institutional grade lending infrastructure underpinning USDS through a suite of products.
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes
